subcodes.title: Words spoken in Dec. 1900
subcodes.first_line: I will explain the station of mankind. When we say man, we mean one endowed with all the attributes... Man has three powers... The Holy Spirit (in its completeness) is given only to the prophets; the people can possess but the rays of the Holy Spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @man's distinction from the animal, @development of capacity and readiness, @The Holy Spirit
